title: Kosgeb Payments and Income Tax Withholding Incentive Rates Have Been Regulated in Provinces Declared as Disaster Areas
bodyHtml:
Presidential Decree No. 138    regarding the businesses benefiting from KOSGEB supports in 11 provinces declared as disaster areas was published in the Official Gazette dated March 31, 2023.

According to the decree, the businesses located in the disaster areas that benefited from KOSGEB supports and whose workplaces were demolished, urgently to be demolished, or heavily or moderately damaged are exempted from paying the support amounts and legal interests that they have to pay in 2023, and the support amounts and legal interests that businesses belonging to those who lost their lives or became incapacitated have to repay, taking into account the partnership share.

In addition, it is stated that the income tax withholding incentive for personnel working in R&D and design centers located in the disaster area will be applied at a rate of 100 percent during the state of emergency period. The same provision is also included in the recently published Decree No. 7015.

The income tax withholding incentive provision will be effective as of 6/2/2023, and the relevant decree, which entered into force on the date of its publication, can be accessed at https://www.resmigazete.gov.tr/eskiler/2023/03/20230331-10.pdf.
